allowed_local_work: source map; invariant memo; known-issue comparison; local-only PoC plan
promotion_requirements: affected asset in scope; impact in scope; not a listed bridge foot gun; passes duplicate matrix; passes security report quality gate
blockers: no live fork transaction; no mainnet/public testnet testing; no private report submission

allowed_local_work: classification memo only; duplicate and exclusion comparison
promotion_requirements: must prove a new bypass beyond documented fake ERC20 or token misconfiguration cases; must prove direct Optimism protocol impact
blockers: third-party token bridge implementation bug; fee-on-transfer/rebasing/local-remote mismatch foot gun; fake ERC20 issue without a new bypass

promotion_requirements: must show issue is outside excluded Alt-DA feature
blockers: Alt-DA feature of op-node/op-batcher is out of scope; node start or network test not authorized

allowed_local_work: read-only source map; upstream route comparison
promotion_requirements: must clear upstream reth and Ethereum Foundation route; must prove Optimism-specific impact not covered upstream
blockers: upstream reth duplicate; Ethereum Foundation replay route; end-of-service client condition

promotion_requirements: must prove issue is not already detected by op-dispute-mon; must prove in-scope direct impact
blockers: op-challenger/dispute-game issue already detected by op-dispute-mon; proof-of-whale Fault Proof attack

candidate_class: Public RPC, Beacon API, or chain-operator topology issue
promotion_requirements: none for excluded public exposure or operator best-practice issues
blockers: public JSON-RPC/Beacon API exposure; chain operator best-practice or network-topology violation

allowed_local_work: scope route memo; no-browser static source/source-map review if public source exists
promotion_requirements: must avoid out-of-scope domains; must verify whether Agora-operated route applies; must prove direct financial impact on OP Stack or Optimism protocol
blockers: third-party systems; browser extension testing; phishing/social engineering; Agora-operated vote/atlas route unless direct protocol financial impact

promotion_requirements: must prove direct code bug and not basic economic/governance/Sybil/centralization risk
blockers: 51% attack; basic economic attack; governance attack; Sybil; centralization risk; lack of liquidity

allowed_local_work: write local review memo; write PoC plan; prepare report draft locally; record no-side-effect validation
promotion_requirements: asset in scope; impact in scope; duplicate matrix passed; quality gate passed; local PoC plan is runnable; no prohibited testing; no submission without exact approval
blockers: missing any required gate; external side effect required
